label: Hall effect regularizes the Alfven singularity over a layer of thickness about d_i

provenance.source_span: Regularization of the Alfvén singularity by the Hall effect Jun-ya Shiraishi, Shuichi Ohsaki, and Zensho Yoshida Citation: Physics of Plasmas (1994-present) 12, 092308 (2005); doi: 10.1063/1.2042948 View online: http://dx.doi.org/10.1063/1.2042948 View Table of Contents: http://scitation.aip.org/content/aip/journal/p

strengths: Shows Hall terms regularize the ideal-MHD singular layer at finite d_i.
weaknesses: That regularization may alter, not merely preserve, the Atlas ideal-MHD spectrum.
